items.title: Ex-Olympian pleads not guilty to Reflecting Pool vandalism charges
items.dek: A former US Olympian canoeist denies accusations that he deliberately damaged the lining of the refurbished Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
items.body: A former US Olympian canoeist denies accusations that he deliberately damaged the lining of the refurbished Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Taylor Swift fans pay $32 for garbage from outside wedding
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
items.dek: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
items.body: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
items.author: IriLine Desk
